hero.description: A-Cube Institute of Skills is a leading human resources supply and skill development solutions provider. We connect government departments, corporates, and CSR-funded projects with qualified professionals — ensuring operational continuity and business growth across Tamil Nadu and beyond.

impacts.title: Numbers.
impacts.description: our impact in creating meaningful opportunities and driving sustainable change

servicesData.desc: We provide skilled and unskilled manpower supported by a robust recruitment, screening, deployment, and monitoring process — ensuring client satisfaction and workforce reliability across industries.
From sourcing to placement, we manage the complete recruitment lifecycle — connecting organizations with the right candidates quickly and efficiently.
As an official training partner of AMHSSC, we deliver vocational, corporate, and industry-specific training programs that enhance employability and create sustainable livelihoods.
We offer strategic HR advisory services to help organizations optimize their workforce, improve talent acquisition, and drive organizational development.

cta.title: Need Reliable Manpower for your Business?
cta.description: Partner with A-Cube Institute of Skills for reliable manpower supply, end-to-end recruitment, HR consulting, and industry-focused skill development programs across Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.

footer.companyInfo: A-Cube Institute of Skills, incorporated in 2021, is a leading human resources supply and skill development solutions provider committed to empowering individuals and supporting organizations through quality manpower and workforce development services.

bottomBar.copyright: © 2026 A-Cube Institute of Skills | Developed by

description: A-Cube Institute of Skills, incorporated in 2021, is a leading human resources supply and skill development solutions provider committed to empowering individuals and supporting organizations through quality manpower and workforce development services.

With over 5 years of combined industry experience, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner for government departments, corporate organizations, CSR initiatives, and development projects across Tamil Nadu and Karnataka. We specialize in manpower supply, recruitment services, skill development, training implementation, and human resource consulting.

Our commitment to quality, reliability, and client satisfaction has enabled us to build long-term relationships with various organizations while contributing to employment generation and workforce development.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the preferred partner for human resources supply and skill development solutions, delivering exceptional value to our clients and creating sustainable livelihood opportunities for individuals.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide high-quality human resources supply and skill development solutions that enhance our clients' productivity, competitiveness, and operational excellence while empowering youth and women through employability and livelihood initiatives.

leadership.quote: "Empowering People Through Skills, Employment, and Workforce Excellence. At A-Cube Institute of Skills, we are dedicated to providing strategic leadership, driving organizational growth, and ensuring successful project implementations through active stakeholder engagement."
leadership.name: ARUNVIGNESH P R
leadership.title: Managing Director
leadership.bio: Provides strategic leadership and oversees organizational growth, project implementation, stakeholder engagement, and business development initiatives.

compliance.description: We maintain all statutory and operational compliances required for effective, reliable service delivery.

content.text: At A-Cube Institute of Skills, accessible from acubeskills.in, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by A-Cube Institute of Skills and how we use it.
1. Information We Collect

We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, when you participate in activities on the Website, or otherwise when you contact us.

items: **Personal Information Provided by You.** We collect names; phone numbers; email addresses; job titles; contact preferences; and other similar information.
**Log and Usage Data.** Log and usage data is service-related, diagnostic, usage, and performance information our servers automatically collect when you access or use our Website.

content.text: 2. How We Use Your Information

We use personal information collected via our Website for a variety of business purposes described below. We process your personal information for these purposes in reliance on our legitimate business interests, in order to enter into or perform a contract with you, with your consent, and/or for compliance with our legal obligations.

items: To facilitate account creation and logon process.
To send administrative information to you.
To fulfill and manage your orders/requests.

content.text: 3. Sharing Your Information
We only share information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations.
4. Contact Us
If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may email us at acubeskills@gmail.com or by post to:

A-Cube Institute of Skills
No:84, Sai Best Complex, Second Floor, 
Kuppana Chetty Street, Palladam road, 
Tiruppur- 641604
Welcome to A-Cube Institute of Skills! These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of A-Cube Institute of Skills's Website, located at acubeskills.in.

By accessing this website we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use A-Cube Institute of Skills if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.
1. License

Unless otherwise stated, A-Cube Institute of Skills and/or its licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on A-Cube Institute of Skills. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access this from A-Cube Institute of Skills for your own personal use subjected to restrictions set in these terms and conditions.

items: Republish material from A-Cube Institute of Skills
Sell, rent or sub-license material from A-Cube Institute of Skills
Reproduce, duplicate or copy material from A-Cube Institute of Skills
Redistribute content from A-Cube Institute of Skills

content.text: 2. User Responsibilities

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes, and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the website. Prohibited behavior includes harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any other user, transmitting obscene or offensive content or disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within this website.
3. Disclaimer
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we exclude all representations, warranties and conditions relating to our website and the use of this website.
As long as the website and the information and services on the website are provided free of charge, we will not be liable for any loss or damage of any nature.
The information contained on acubeskills.in website (the "Service") is for general information purposes only.
A-Cube Institute of Skills assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in the contents on the Service.

In no event shall A-Cube Institute of Skills be liable for any special, direct, indirect, consequential, or incidental damages or any damages whatsoever, whether in an action of contract, negligence or other tort, arising out of or in connection with the use of the Service or the contents of the Service. A-Cube Institute of Skills reserves the right to make additions, deletions, or modification to the contents on the Service at any time without prior notice.
External Links Disclaimer
acubeskills.in website may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by or in any way affiliated with A-Cube Institute of Skills.
Please note that the A-Cube Institute of Skills does not guarantee the accuracy, relevance, timeliness, or completeness of any information on these external websites.
Professional Disclaimer

The services information is provided for general informational and educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional advice. Accordingly, before taking any actions based upon such information, we encourage you to consult with the appropriate professionals. We do not provide any kind of specific legal or HR compliance advice online.
